aeo_readiness.summary: While the business has a strong local presence, it lacks the conversational content and structured data needed for AI assistants to cite or recommend it effectively.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
Add a 'HowTo' schema for common HVAC maintenance or installation processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate hours, but it lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No engagement with customer questions in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all major directories.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any new citations or inconsistencies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
Missing Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content prevents AI from recognizing their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips, installation guides, and troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with detailed answers to common HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating in-depth content on HVAC maintenance and installation, supported by HowTo schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and structured data, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, and their GBP lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
agency_pitch.solution: We will implement structured data, create conversational content, and optimize their GBP to ensure AI models cite and recommend their services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in AI-driven search results.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Keller Services HVAC
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found significant opportunities to make your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven searches.
